Package cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.house

Class House

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.AbstractEntity
cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.house.House
public class House
extends AbstractEntity
This class represents House.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Oľga Ostashchuk, Tereza Lodrová, Michal Pechník
